channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cowboys shutting down CeeDee Lamb with 2 games to go over receiver's shoulder issue
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys are shutting down CeeDee Lamb with two games remaining after their 2023 All-Pro receiver spent the second half of the season dealing with a sprained right shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 49ers put end to left tackle Trent Williams’ painful season
item.description: The 49ers (6-9) placed left tackle Trent Williams on injured reserve Thrusday, the result of an ankle injury that will have sidelined him their final seven games this season.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Haaland penalty failure and Fernandes red card pile on woes for City and United in Premier League
item.description: Erling Haaland’s failure from the penalty spot and Bruno Fernandes’ latest red card have compounded the woes of Manchester City and Manchester United on another tough day for the two Premier League giants.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ravens rout Texans on Christmas, inch closer to division title
item.description: The Baltimore Ravens gave the Houston Texans a lump of coal for Christmas and moved up to first place in the AFC North Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro Picks: Chargers over Patriots is the best bet and Broncos and Vikings will pull off upsets
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ Playoff berths, draft positioning and more are up for grabs in Week 17.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Embiid shakes off pregame fall, leads Sixers to 118-114 win over Celtics
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Joel Embiid popped up from a pregame fall and scored 27 points with nine rebounds, making 4 of 5 from 3-point range and sinking a pair of free throws with 3 seconds left to turn back Boston’s final rally and lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 118-114 victory on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark raised the profile of women's basketball to unprecedented levels in both the college ranks and the WNBA, and Tuesday she was named the AP Female Athlete of the Year for her impact on and off the court.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks drop 2nd straight on road trip in 4-3 loss to Wild
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Brock Faber snapped a tie in the third period, and the Minnesota Wild stopped a four-game losing streak by edging the Blackhawks, 4-3, on Monday night. Kirill Kaprizov, Jared Spurgeon and Marcus Foligno also scored for Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lamar Jackson and the Ravens draw even atop the AFC North, beating the 1st-place Steelers 34-17
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson was solid in Baltimore's biggest game of the season so far. Then, after one of the star quarterback's rare slip-ups, one of his teammates delivered the play of the day.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Day 3: Winter Classic Basketball
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Palisade High School was buzzing on Day 3 of the Winter Classic as the Fruita Wildcats faced off against the Palmer Ridge Bears. Fruita entered the game riding high after a recent win against Ponderosa, while Palmer Ridge looked to snap a three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: What to know for the Mizzou-Illinois Braggin' Rights game and how to watch
item.description: It's almost time for another Braggin' Rights matchup between two cross-state college basketball rivals: The Missouri Tigers and Illinois Fighting Illini.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Ryans, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz win back-to-back games for first time this season
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since April, the Utah Jazz are on a winning streak. Lauri Markkanen scored 21 points, Collin Sexton and Svi Mykhailiuk each had 18 points, and the Utah Jazz beat the Brooklyn Nets 105-94 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texans WR Tank Dell hospitalized after severe knee injury on TD catch vs. Chiefs
item.description: Texans wide receiver Tank Dell was taken to the University of Kansas Medical Center and the team said he would remain overnight after sustaining a severe left knee injury while making a 30-yard touchdown catch in a 27-19 loss to the Chiefs on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Senate passes RFK Stadium land bill, giving the Washington Commanders a major off-the-field win
item.description: The path for the NFL's Washington Commanders to return to the nation’s capital is clear after an on-again, off-again saga in Congress ended early Saturday with a postmidnight reprieve.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Caprock Hockey hangs tough with defending State Champion Durango
item.description: In their second-ever varsity home game, the Caprock Eagles once again had a tough test, this time with the defending 4A State Champion Durango Demons.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Utes land talented running back Wayshawn Parker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team may have picked up its biggest off-season acquisition yet. Washington State running back Wayshawn Parker, considered one of the top backs in the transfer portal, announced he will play for the Utes next season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls beat Celtics 117-108 in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Celtics forward Jaylen Brown took issue with back-to-back technical fouls called on coach Joe Mazzulla and himself late in the fourth quarter of Boston’s 117-108 loss to the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mikheyev stars as 'Hawks beat Kraken 3-1 for 3rd straight win
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Ilya Mikheyev scored two more goals, Arvid Soderblom made 27 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Seattle Kraken 3-1 on Thursday night for their third straight win. Teuvo Teravainen had two assists as Chicago closed out a perfect three-game homestand.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Broncos show growing pains in second-half collapse to Chargers
item.description: In a pivotal Thursday Night, AFC West battle in Los Angeles with plenty of playoff implications, we saw no lack of offense.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Winter Classic Day 2: Palisade boys show off versatility in big win over Moffat County
item.description: On day two of the annual Winter Classic presented by Family Health West, the Palisade Bulldogs took center stage on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Kucherov has 2 assists as Lightning beat Blues 3-1
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a pair of assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 3-1 victory against the St. Louis Blues. Anthony Cirelli, Gage Goncalves and Nick Perbix scored for the Lightning, who have won six of their last seven. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 31 saves in the win.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC releases 2025 regular season schedule
item.description: San Diego FC will be kicking off its first regular season match in franchise history in February against a rival city.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5
